name: voice-analyzer-chain
description: Analyze writing samples to extract voice characteristics and generate AI-ready style guides for consistent writing assistance.

user_writing_sample.description: Raw writing sample to analyze (minimum 500 words recommended)

user_sample_context.description: Brief description of writing's original purpose (optional)

user_focus_areas.description: Specific aspects to emphasize: tone, vocabulary, sentence_structure, punctuation (optional)

user_target_audience.description: Who will use the style guide: AI writing assistant, human editor, content team, individual writer (optional)

terminal_outputs.description: Structured analysis with tone, vocabulary, syntax, and voice signature profiles
Markdown-formatted style guide with tone, vocabulary, syntax, punctuation, examples, and AI prompting tips
Validation report with confidence scores and refinement recommendations
Metadata including word count, language, timestamp, and confidence levels
